info.name: Multi-Vendor Checkout API
info.description: Postman collection for the Laravel multi-vendor checkout project. Set `base_url` first, then run the auth requests to populate tokens. API requests use `{{api_base}}`, which defaults to `{{base_url}}/api`.

request.description: Creates a fresh customer account and returns a Sanctum token.
Logs in with the seeded customer account.
Logs in with the seeded admin account.
Creates one pending order per vendor in the cart.
Simulates gateway confirmation and marks pending orders as paid.
